questions.question: Describe CIE 1931 color space and its main characteristics. (5 marks)
questions.hint: CIE 1931 color space is an additive color model used to describe colors in terms of their RGB values.

questions.question: What is the difference between RGB and CMYK color models? (5 marks)
questions.hint: RGB is an additive model used for digital displays, while CMYK is a subtractive model used for printing.

questions.question: What is pseudocolor image processing and how does it differ from true color image processing? (10 marks)
questions.hint: Pseudocolor image processing involves converting true color images into a limited color palette, whereas true color image processing uses the full color gamut.
